title: Mistral AI Model
description: Schema for a Mistral AI model object, representing a base or fine-tuned language model with its capabilities and metadata.

ModelCapabilities.description: The capabilities supported by a model.

completion_chat.description: Whether the model supports chat completions.

completion_fim.description: Whether the model supports fill-in-the-middle completions.

function_calling.description: Whether the model supports function calling.

fine_tuning.description: Whether the model can be used as a base for fine-tuning.

vision.description: Whether the model supports vision and image inputs.

id.description: The unique model identifier used in API requests.

created.description: Unix timestamp when the model was created.

owned_by.description: The organization that owns the model.

name.description: The human-readable display name of the model.

description.description: A description of the model and its intended use cases.

max_context_length.description: Maximum context length in tokens supported by the model.

aliases.description: Alternative identifiers that can be used to reference the model.

deprecation.description: The deprecation date of the model, if scheduled.

type.description: Whether this is a base model or a fine-tuned model.
